_comment: Connection-manifest for the Presentations department. Every 'required: true' entry must resolve to a non-empty value in openclaw.json before this dept may be marked done. verify-wiring.sh reads this file and checks each cfg_key (and each listed cfg_key_alias). A hook may also carry assert_contains_dept:true to require that this dept's slug is present in the resolved JSON file.

connection_points.name: kie-api-key
connection_points.description: Kie.ai API key required for the Slide Submitter role to generate images via GPT Image 2. Without this key the presentation pipeline cannot produce slides.

connection_points.name: kie-images-per-batch
connection_points.description: Kie.ai image batch size (images per 10-second window). Governs rate limiting for the Slide Submitter role.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel LOCATION Private Integration Token (PIT) used by the Media Librarian + Delivery Concierge to upload slide PNGs and the final deliverables to the GHL media library via POST services.leadconnectorhq.com/medias/upload-file. MUST be the LOCATION token, NOT an agency token (the agency PIT returns 401 for media ops). The upload tool (ghl_media.py) reads GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY first, then the legacy alias GHL_API_KEY; verify-wiring accepts either.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location (sub-account) ID so the media upload targets the correct media library (multipart field locationId). The upload tool reads GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID first, then the legacy alias GHL_LOCATION_ID; verify-wiring accepts either.

connection_points.name: command-center-board-entry
connection_points.description: The Presentations department must be listed in the Command Center departments.json so the client can monitor pipeline status from the dashboard. cfg_key resolves to the departments.json path; assert_contains_dept requires that an entry for this dept (slug 'presentations') is present (seeded) in that file.

connection_points.name: delivery-destination-drive
connection_points.description: Google Drive folder ID where the Delivery Concierge deposits the final PPTX/PDF deliverable.

connection_points.name: command-center-api
connection_points.description: CC base URL for producer-side board writes (job-start ingest via POST /api/tasks/ingest + per-phase PATCH). Used by cc_board.ingest_deck_task and cc_board.patch_phase; absent => clean no-op (logged, run continues ungrouped). verify-wiring.sh reads COMMAND_CENTER_URL first, then the alias MISSION_CONTROL_URL.

connection_points.name: command-center-webhook-secret
connection_points.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for the x-webhook-signature header on CC board writes (POST /api/tasks/ingest + PATCH). Absent => signature omitted and the endpoint no-ops the check (dev/no-secret mode). cc_board reads WEBHOOK_SECRET first, then the alias CC_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
